entity.label: Gallim
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Heaps, (1 Sam. 25:44; Isa. 10:30). The native place of Phalti, to whom Michal was given by Saul. It was probably in Benjamin, to the north of Jerusalem.

nodes.label: Gallim
nodes.description: Heaps, (1 Sam. 25:44; Isa. 10:30). The native place of Phalti, to whom Michal was given by Saul. It was probably in Benjamin, to the north of Jerusalem.

verses.text: But Saul had given Michal his daughter, David’s wife, to Phalti the son of Laish, which was of Gallim.
Lift up thy voice, O daughter of Gallim: cause it to be heard unto Laish, O poor Anathoth.
